slack_variables.label: Margin Headroom
slack_variables.description: How much room the business has before cost pressure shows. Erodes under automation pressure and delegation.

slack_variables.label: Discovery Optionality
slack_variables.description: How many discovery channels remain viable. Shrinks as agents bypass traditional pathways.

slack_variables.label: Operational Redundancy
slack_variables.description: Backup capacity for when primary channels fail. High automation reduces this.

pressure_variables.label: Automation Fragility
pressure_variables.description: Accumulated brittleness from automation dependency. High automation without redundancy increases this.

pressure_variables.label: Trust Debt
pressure_variables.description: Accumulated erosion of user trust from opaque or aggressive margin capture strategies.

pressure_variables.label: Verification Burden
pressure_variables.description: Cost of verifying agent-mediated outcomes. Rises as delegation increases without outcome alignment.

pressure_variables.label: Revenue Rigidity
pressure_variables.description: How locked-in the revenue model is to attention-based economics. Hard to pivot once rigid.

drift_rules.description: High automation increases fragility and reduces redundancy each turn
High attention dependency gradually closes discovery channels and locks revenue model

escalation_thresholds.description: Verification burden triggers margin squeeze and regulatory scrutiny

collapse_points.description: Trust debt critical — alignment capture permanently disabled, margin headroom capped at 20

oscillation_penalties.description: Flip-flopping increases trust debt and reduces margin headroom
